summary: Screenprinting businesses that use Printavo-style order systems and social channels to manage customers, repeat orders, sales follow-up, and social demand.
tenantDocScope: Applies to every tenant with tenantType.id=screenprinting unless that tenant explicitly overrides the rule in its tenant-specific docs or workspace config.
tenantSpecificDocScope: Tenant docs under docs/tenants/<tenant>/ may document tenant-only decisions, credentials, pilots, dirty-data exceptions, and rollout notes. They must not redefine the universal screenprinting type contract.
configurationSurfaces: reorder cycles and high-value repeat windows
securityBoundaries: Every runtime row must be scoped by organization_id.
Provider credentials must be tenant-scoped credentials stored through encrypted integration installs or tenant-scoped environment keys.
Screenprinting defaults must never expose one tenant's Printavo, Instagram, dashboard, or customer data to another tenant.
